description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this olive green shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. The bag is large enough to accomodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get apprecaitive glances all day long. The versatile bag looks as great with casual outfits as it does with your formal wear. Time to take the office by storm, and be the coolest chick at the mall too! Made of leather for enhanced durability and style Two roomy zippered compartments with a smaller internal zippered pocket to accomodate items Small zippered compartment at the back for stowing essentials Zippered compartments on the front with stud detailing for storing essentials Two short padded handles for ease of carrying and improved comfort Leather bands that run along the handles and end on the sides with fixed buckles Branded zippers and sliders for easy useBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
